allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(open\('energy-analysis-workflow.json'\)\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('node count:', len\(d.get\('nodes',[]\)\)\); [print\(' ', n.get\('type'\), '|', n.get\('data',{}\).get\('type'\), '|', n.get\('data',{}\).get\('name'\)\) for n in d.get\('nodes',[]\)]")
